meta.title: How to Beat ARC AGI 2?
meta.description:
🤝Join the Team | Sponsor the Team: Trelis.com/arc-agi-2

Video Links:
- Slides: https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1NFjeFxoi4_JssxT-FXkVjr_gMTZs0f9qdlZQvTxukjU/edit?usp=sharing
- How to Beat ARC AGI 2 Blog: https://lewish.io/posts/how-to-beat-arc-agi-2
- ARC Prize Tasks: https://arcprize.org/play?task=e3721c99

TIMESTAMPS:
0:00 Introduction and Team Formation
01:10 Overview of ARC AGI Challenge
03:13 Call for Team Members and Sponsors
04:07 Hypotheses for Solving ARC
05:42 Detailed Explanation of Hypotheses
06:18 Understanding Program Generation and Primitives
18:51 Training Data and Expressive Primitives
23:52 Test Time Adaptation
28:35 Research Plan and Conclusion
